Three bedroom terrace for sale

Station Road, Bristol, BS1

£450,000

  • 3 bedrooms
  • 2 bathrooms
  • 1,210 sq ft

Photos

Street view Main room Cooking area Rear space Layout plan

Home details

A bright family residence with a broad front room, updated cooking area, and doors leading to a planted rear garden.

The upper floor contains three bedrooms and two bathrooms, including a private shower room. Transport links and neighborhood services are nearby.

Key features

  • Classic terrace with current finishes
  • Connected cooking and dining space
  • Enclosed rear garden
